name: Museu Diocesà de Menorca
description: The diocesan museum of Ciutadella, in the former convent of Sant Agustí (el Socors): a cloister of silence, sacred art and archaeology, with work by the Menorcan painter Pere Daura. The ticket can be combined with the Cathedral, a pairing of calm and heritage in the stately heart of the west.

highlights: stroll the cloister of the convent of Sant Agustí
see 18th- and 19th-century painting and work by Pere Daura, alongside local archaeology
combine the visit with the Catedral de Santa Maria on a single ticket
